steps.title: Identify the genetic-behavioral framework
steps.content:
The first study reveals that genetic similarities between breeds explain their behavioral similarities in trainability.

The second study finds bulldogs and French bulldogs display similar trainability.

Combining these findings: similar trainability suggests shared genetics.

steps.title: Apply the framework to the answer choices
steps.content:
C correctly concludes that similar trainability could result from shared genetic factors.

The other choices either compare to breeds not discussed (A), contradict the similarity finding (B), or speculate about future change (D).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
